ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the county is located (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county (people per square mile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_incidence_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incidence rate record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data is collected */,
  "age_adjusted_rate" REAL /* Age-adjusted incidence rate (cases per 100,000) */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "ci_rank_low" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the CI rank */,
  "ci_rank_high" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the CI rank */,
  "average_annual_count" INTEGER /* Average annual count of cancer cases */,
  "recent_trend" TEXT /* Recent trend (e.g., rising, falling, stable) */,
  "recent_5_year_trend" TEXT /* Recent 5-year trend in incidence rates (e.g., 0.9 (0.6, 1.1)) */,
  "cancer_type" TEXT /* Type of cancer (e.g., lung, breast, colon) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results (SEER) Program) */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_incidence_rates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_incidence_rates_cancer_type FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_incidence_rates_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., hospital, university, government agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incidence rate record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data (e.g., cancer type, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES cancer_incidence_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_analysis" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the trend is analyzed */,
  "trend_period" TEXT /* Period of the trend analysis (e.g., recent 5-year trend) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Trend value (e.g., -0.7) */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the trend */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for the trend */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type */,
  "cancer_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incidence rate record being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES cancer_incidence_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incidence rate record being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "visualization_config" TEXT /* Configuration for the data visualization (e.g., colors, axis labels) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES cancer_incidence_rates ("rate_id")
)
